exemplar.title:
SEHS & BM

Research Question: To what extent does sports science research carried out by Gatoradeâs Sports Science Institute impact Gatoradeâs market positioning in the sports drink industry?

detailedExemplarData.title:
SEHS & BM

Research Question: To what extent does sports science research carried out by Gatoradeâs Sports Science Institute impact Gatoradeâs market positioning in the sports drink industry?

strengths: Topic is communicated clearly and appropriately, with strong contextual framing of market size and relevance (Strand 4f163848-fc98-481f-8df5-e8e8ee71edc2).
Research question is concise, interdisciplinary and fully focused, specifying variables and scope (Strand 4f163848-fc98-481f-8df5-e8e8ee71edc2).
weaknesses: Methodology selection is generally appropriate but justification for each framework (7Ps, PLC, CAGR) lacks depth and explicit triangulation plan (Strand 7725b3a1-a792-42bd-acd7-b458f9241239).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands clearly meet the top band descriptors (topic communication and research question), with only a minor weakness in methodological justification. Overall, the focus and method are fully coherent and appropriate for an extended essay, meriting the maximum 6 marks.

strengths: Source material is mostly relevant and includes peer-reviewed journals and authoritative market reports, demonstrating good breadth (Strand 770076fd-b465-466c-9f92-7e6aa7ff3fc1).
Knowledge of physiology and business concepts is clear, and application to Gatoradeâs formulation and branding shows solid integration (Strand 770076fd-b465-466c-9f92-7e6aa7ff3fc1).
Terminology such as âeuhydration,â âCAGR,â and âmarket positioningâ is accurate and generally consistent (Strand 770076fd-b465-466c-9f92-7e6aa7ff3fc1).
weaknesses: Selection of some popular websites reduces overall source sophistication; expert-level choice is not fully achieved (Strand 770076fd-b465-466c-9f92-7e6aa7ff3fc1).
Minor spelling errors and occasional undefined abbreviations (e.g., 7Ps, PLC) detract from precision (Strand 770076fd-b465-466c-9f92-7e6aa7ff3fc1).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates coherent understanding and application of disciplinary concepts, with mostly appropriate and relevant sources. A few stylistic and source-selection issues prevent the top band, placing the work solidly at 5 marks.

strengths: Majority of research is well chosen and relevant, bridging sports-science studies with market data effectively (Research quality strand 8ce331a8-9d58-4a12-abf4-8058109127d0).

Analysis is coherent with largely supported conclusions; quantitative insights (e.g., inline math for market-share calculations) strengthen arguments (Analysis strand 8ce331a8-9d58-4a12-abf4-8058109127d0).

Argument is structured interdisciplinary, offering critical insight (e.g., ethics of sodium levels vs. competitor strategies) and acknowledging methodological biases (Argument structure strand b417437c-72e1-4a3e-b2de-9505d7830aaf).
weaknesses: Some conclusions lack full quantitative backing and broader socio-economic nuance is underdeveloped (Analysis and conclusions strand b417437c-72e1-4a3e-b2de-9505d7830aaf).
Reliability of certain commercial blog sources is not rigorously evaluated (Research quality strand c65b7033-437b-40c0-a43d-0b4643a8b62d).
Product life-cycle discussion remains partially descriptive without deep risk analysis (Argument structure strand c65b7033-437b-40c0-a43d-0b4643a8b62d).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the essay demonstrates coherent, relevant research and structured interdisciplinary argument with critical insight, the limited evaluation of some sources and gaps in quantitative substantiation place it at the low end of the 7â9 band, warranting 7 marks.

strengths: Clear table of contents and consistent section headings create an overall academic structure (Academic structure strand d54afd24-bbfd-40a4-a4a3-17d500fa709e).
Visuals (graphs, tables, nutritional labels) are generally well chosen and labelled (Visual elements strand d54afd24-bbfd-40a4-a4a3-17d500fa709e).
weaknesses: Referencing style is inconsistent (mix of MLA, APA, footnotes) and some URLs are broken across lines (Referencing strand 441693a8-60e0-43c3-8cac-0cc04ccee522).
Table of contents page numbers misalign with actual sections; repeated headings reduce navigational clarity (Academic structure strand 441693a8-60e0-43c3-8cac-0cc04ccee522).
Figure captions lack detail (axes, units, source attribution), limiting interpretability (Visual elements strand 441693a8-60e0-43c3-8cac-0cc04ccee522).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The report has a recognisable academic structure and useful visuals, but inconsistent referencing and navigational errors prevent reaching the top band for presentation. A score of 3 reflects competent but imperfect formatting and visual support.

strengths: The introduction links the topic to the studentâs athletic experience, showing some personal engagement (Personal engagement strand 7a651887-cfbe-4846-b223-260c25839816).
Interdisciplinary focus on SEHS and Business Management indicates intellectual interest (Intellectual initiative strand 7a651887-cfbe-4846-b223-260c25839816).
weaknesses: No RPPF reflections are provided, so analytical reflection on planning and challenges is absent (Quality of reflections strand 69f626eb-d947-408d-b691-752b9123c375).
Investigation relies heavily on secondary data with limited original methodological initiative (Intellectual initiative strand 2ef512d2-13b0-4205-9c9c-efb9bbe1f1a1).
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Personal engagement and interdisciplinary initiative are evident at a basic level, but the absence of reflective documentation and primary research constrains the overall engagement score to 2 marks.

strandSelections.reasoning: The essay follows a logical structure (7Ps subsections, competitor analysis) and attempts interdisciplinary synthesis.  Critical insight appears when contrasting science-driven sodium levels with BodyArmorâs potassium strategy.  Yet evaluation lacks nuance about broader socio-economic factors, preventing entry into the 7â9 or 10â12 bands.

A full âWorks Citedâ list is provided and in-text parenthetical citations appear, but formatting mixes MLA, APA-style dates, and footnote-like notes.  Some URLs are broken across lines and not all figures are cited.  Referencing is therefore present but inconsistent.

The student states a clearly delimited topic â the influence of GSSI research on Gatoradeâs market positioning â and situates it within the broader sports-drink market and the IB World-Studies theme of Health & Development. The introduction gives sufficient contextual data (market size, CAGR, leading brands) and explains why the investigation matters for both science and business.  These elements make the focus explicit and appropriate for an EE, satisfying the top-band description.

There is a clear table of contents, section headings, and pagination, giving the report a recognisable academic structure.  However, some headings overlap (Marketing Mix repeated) and page references in the contents misalign slightly, so coherence is acceptable but not flawless.

The essay demonstrates clear understanding of core physiology (thermoregulation, electrolyte loss) and business concepts (premium pricing, PLC).  Evidence is applied to argue how GSSI findings steer product formulation and branding.  However, some explanations are descriptive and references are occasionally superficial, so integration is solid but not fully coherent or sophisticated.
No RPPF reflections are supplied with the submission, so there is no evidence on which to assess reflective quality.

Analysis connects GSSI findings to Gatoradeâs pricing, promotion and market share changes.  Conclusions about ethical implications and market-share shifts are plausible but not always fully substantiated with quantitative evidence, so support remains partial rather than comprehensive.

The research question is presented verbatim, is concise, and integrates two disciplines (SEHS & Business).  It clearly specifies the independent variable (sports-science research by GSSI) and the dependent variable (Gatoradeâs market positioning).  The wording avoids ambiguity and is appropriately scoped for 4 000 words, meeting the criteria for a fully focused RQ.

The majority of cited research is pertinent to either sports-nutrition science or market performance, and the student often links data sets (e.g., electrolyte studies to product labels).  Nonetheless, some sources are commercial blogs and the evaluation of their reliability is limited, keeping the work in the mid-band.

While selecting an interdisciplinary question shows some initiative, the investigation relies heavily on readily available secondary data.  There is little evidence of original primary research, advanced data analysis or novel theoretical frameworks, keeping initiative at a minimal level.

The student outlines secondary-data analysis, the 7Ps, PLC and CAGR metrics, and recognises limitations such as bias in market reports.  While methods are generally suitable, justification of why each framework best addresses the RQ is brief and there is no explicit plan for triangulating scientific and commercial data.  The selection is thus âgenerally appropriateâ rather than fully âeffective and informedâ.

Sources range from peer-reviewed journals (Sports Medicine, Nutrients) to reputable market reports (Euromonitor, Statista) alongside some popular websites (Healthline).  Overall relevance is satisfactory and most materials directly address hydration science or sports-drink markets, but the mix is uneven and not yet âexpertly chosenâ.

The introduction briefly notes the studentâs personal experience as an athlete and curiosity about GSSI.  Beyond this, personal engagement is limited; there are few instances where the studentâs voice shapes research choices or demonstrates significant initiative.

Several graphs, tables and nutritional labels are inserted and generally labelled (Fig 1, Fig 3, etc.).  Captions are present but occasionally abbreviated, and source attribution for images is sometimes implicit, so the visuals are useful yet not exemplary.

Disciplinary terminology such as âeuhydrationâ, âCAGRâ, and âmarket positioningâ is mostly accurate and used consistently.  Minor spelling errors ("forumulation", "lovalty") and occasional awkward phrasing prevent the depth and precision expected for the top band.

annotations.comment: Several URLs are split across lines, which can break links; ensure URLs remain intact in the final formatting.
Inconsistent referencing styles (APA, MLA, footnotes) distract; adopt a single style guide consistently.
The final bibliography on p.25 is properly numbered and complete, indicating thorough source selection.
The title contains an apostrophe error (âit'sâ should be âitsâ), which affects professional presentation. Correct this to maintain academic tone and precision.
The research question is clearly stated and fully focused on GSSIâs impact on market positioning, demonstrating excellent alignment with the investigationâs scope.
Listing both SEHS and Business Management illustrates interdisciplinary engagement, enhancing the investigationâs relevance to World Studies.
The word count is provided at the start, meeting IB formatting requirements and showing adherence to report convention.
Table of contents page numbers misalign with actual sections (e.g., Marketing Mix appears twice on p.4), reducing navigational clarity.
Session information is extraneous; consider relocating or removing it to maintain focus on academic content.
Strong personal narrative links the studentâs athletic experience to the topic, demonstrating moderate personal engagement.
The second paragraph repeats CAGR data already mentioned; streamline to avoid redundancy and improve flow.
Market data in the second paragraph lacks an explicit citation. Add parenthetical references to reinforce academic rigor.
Figure 1 caption is minimal (âU.S Sports Drink Marketâ)âadd source attribution and clarify axes to meet IB visual conventions.
The methodology section outlines secondary sources and frameworks, but lacks justification for selecting each model over alternatives.
Framework abbreviations (7Ps, PLC) are used without defining all components firstâensure full definitions to support reader comprehension.
Acknowledgement of data limitations is appropriate, but detailing triangulation methods would strengthen methodological rigor.
Repeated âMARKETING MIXâ heading appears twice; consolidate to avoid structural redundancy and improve coherence.
Spelling errors such as âlovaltyâ for loyalty weaken professional presentation; proofread terminology carefully.
Discussion of the PLC stages is descriptive; link each stage back to the research question to maintain focused analysis.
The link between flavor launches and physiological research is asserted but not evidenced; cite specific GSSI studies for credibility.
Early-page discussion of product life cycle lacks critical evaluation; consider potential market risks as maturity declines.
Analysis of brand loyalty and value is lucid, demonstrating coherent integration of marketing and physiological concepts.
The explanation of thermoregulation is accurate but drifts into lecture style; condense and focus on relevance to Gatorade formulation.
Graphs illustrating temperature change are well chosen, but captions lack detailed labels for axes and units.
Use of inline math for $$\frac{5.9}{9.4} \times 100 = 70.24\%$$ is precise and supports quantitative analysis well.
The market-share formula is presented clearly, but intermediate calculations (e.g., total market value) should be shown stepwise.
The critical evaluation of methodological biases near p.19 is insightful, linking sample constraints to market data validity.
Conclusion reiterates findings but could integrate an explicit recommendation for future research to extend the argument.
Works Cited list is comprehensive, but referencing style is inconsistentâstandardize to APA or MLA for uniformity.
